LanguageData.AM_AllowableTurn.label: AllowableTurn
LanguageData.AM_AllowRightTurn.description: An old street sign indicating a right turn.
LanguageData.AM_AllowRightTurn.label: forked road sign
LanguageData.AM_Crossroad.description: An old street sign indicating a crossroad.
LanguageData.AM_Crossroad.label: Crossroad sign
LanguageData.AM_ManAtWork.description: An old street sign depicting a person doing work.
LanguageData.AM_ManAtWork.label: Man at work sign
LanguageData.AM_MotorVehicleLane.description: An old street sign indicating a motor vehicle lane.
LanguageData.AM_MotorVehicleLane.label: motor vehicle lane sign
LanguageData.AM_NoAccess.description: An old street sign indicating no access.
LanguageData.AM_NoAccess.label: no access sign
LanguageData.AM_NoGhoul.description: An old street sign indicating that ghouls are not permitted.
LanguageData.AM_NoGhoul.label: no Ghouls permitted sign
LanguageData.AM_NoParking.description: An old street sign indicating no parking.
LanguageData.AM_NoParking.label: no parking sign
LanguageData.AM_Notice.description: An old street sign warning of something.
LanguageData.AM_Notice.label: notice sign
LanguageData.AM_NoTurningAaround.description: An old street sign indicating a driver must not U-Turn.
LanguageData.AM_NoTurningAaround.label: no U-Turn sign
LanguageData.AM_ParkingPermitted.description: An old street sign indicating permitted parking.
LanguageData.AM_ParkingPermitted.label: parking permitted sign
LanguageData.AM_SpeedLimit40KPH.description: An old street sign depicting a speed limit of 40.
LanguageData.AM_SpeedLimit40KPH.label: speed limit sign
LanguageData.AM_SteepAscent.description: An old street sign indicating an incoming steep ascent.
LanguageData.AM_SteepAscent.label: steep ascent sign
LanguageData.AM_TurnAround.description: An old street sign indicating a u-turn.
LanguageData.AM_TurnAround.label: U-Turn sign
LanguageData.AM_WatchForBug.description: An old street sign warning about hostile insects.
LanguageData.AM_WatchForBug.label: watch for insects sign
LanguageData.AM_WatchForGorehulk.description: An old street sign depicting an ominous warning.
LanguageData.AM_WatchForGorehulk.label: watch for Gorehulk sign
LanguageData.AM_WatchForMachine.description: An old street sign warning against hostile mechanoids.
LanguageData.AM_WatchForMachine.label: watch for Mechanoid sign
LanguageData.AM_WatchForMetalhorror.description: An old street sign depicting an ominous warning.
LanguageData.AM_WatchForMetalhorror.label: watch for Metalhorror sign
LanguageData.AM_WatchForNoctol.description: An old street sign depicting an ominous warning
LanguageData.AM_WatchForNoctol.label: watch for Noctol sign
